name: Hong Kong Economic Times Holdings Limited
summary: Hong Kong Economic Times Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a diversified multi-media company primarily in Hong Kong. The company operates through Media; and Financial News Agency, Information, and Solutions segments. The Media segment engages in the printing and publication of newspapers, magazines, periodicals, and books, as well as advertising and circulation activities. This segment also operates digital platforms, including recruitment, finance, and lifestyle. The Financial News Agency, Information, and Solutions segment provides electronic financial and property market information and related solutions; and information subscription services, solutions, and other related maintenance services. The company also provides recruitment advertising and training services; equities and derivatives trading solutions, and funds market database and solutions to the professional market; and operates computer software research and development center, and health portal. Hong Kong Economic Times Holdings Limited was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in North Point, Hong Kong.
